subject: Your OpenMentor profile has been deactivated
html:
Your profile is hidden from the catalog — here's how to get back
PAUSED
Profile deactivated
Hi {{mentor_name}} — we've temporarily deactivated your mentor profile, so it's no longer visible in the catalog. You have requests that have been waiting for a response for more than 30 days — we do this to protect mentees, and your reputation as a mentor.
Getting back is easy
1. Sign in to your dashboard with a magic link — no password needed.
2. Resolve the waiting requests: get in touch, or decline the ones you can't take.
3. Re-activate your profile on the profile edit page — you're back in the catalog right away.
Sign in to reactivate
Taking a longer break from mentoring? Completely fine — your profile will be waiting for you.
Think this was a mistake? Write to hello@openmentor.io.
Hope to see you back soon · openmentor.io
text:
Hi {{mentor_name}},

We've temporarily deactivated your mentor profile, so it's no longer visible in the OpenMentor catalog. You have requests that have been waiting for a response for more than 30 days — we do this to protect mentees, and your reputation as a mentor.

Getting back is easy:
1. Sign in to your dashboard with a magic link (no password needed): https://openmentor.io/mentor/login
2. Resolve the waiting requests: get in touch with the mentees, or decline the ones you can't take.
3. Re-activate your profile on the profile edit page — you're back in the catalog right away.

Taking a longer break from mentoring? Completely fine — your profile will be waiting for you. Think this was a mistake? Write to hello@openmentor.io.

Hope to see you back soon!

---
openmentor.io · free mentorship for the tech community
https://openmentor.io
